Name: update_departments
SQL: WITH mutation_result AS (UPDATE "public"."departments" SET "budget" = $1::numeric WHERE (departments."name" = $2::text OR departments."name" = $3::text) RETURNING *) SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result), 'returning', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json("_e")), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT mutation_result."id" AS "id" FROM mutation_result) AS "_e"))
